channel.title: Cadence 步频 — PT Research Signal
channel.description: Daily curated physical therapy & rehab research for clinicians. AI-scored signal from 50+ journals.

item.title: Physical Therapy Management of Children With Developmental Coordination Disorder: A 2026 Evidence-Based Clinical Practice Guideline from the American Physical Therapy Association Academy of Pediatric Physical Therapy
item.description: APTA 儿科物理治疗学会发布了 2026 年发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗循证临床实践指南。这是你在管理此类患者时的权威参考，务必深入研读并应用于实践。
item.author: APTA

item.title: APTA Orthopedics: Hip Pain and Mobility Deficits—Hip Osteoarthritis: Revision 2025
item.description: APTA 骨科分会发布了 2025 年髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎指南的修订版。这是髋关节骨关节炎物理治疗的黄金标准，请务必将其整合到你的临床决策中。
item.author: APTA

item.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
item.description: This systematic review of RCTs and comparative cohorts found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤14 days) and delayed (≥28 days) rehabilitation after primary rTSA.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Innovative technologies for gait rehabilitation in incomplete spinal cord injury: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
item.description: A systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized current evidence on technological interventions for gait rehabilitation in adults with incomplete spinal cord injury, highlighting their efficacy.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
item.description: A randomized controlled trial with 2-year follow-up found that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol was non-inferior to a longitudinal protocol for proximal hamstring avulsion repair, with similar clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Hand Pain and Sensory Deficits: Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Clinical Practice Guidelines
item.description: 腕管综合征 (Carpal Tunnel Syndrome) 的物理治疗临床实践指南已更新。这为你提供了最新的循证建议，确保你的评估和干预策略与时俱进。
item.author: APTA

item.title: Treatment Guideline for Foot and Ankle
item.description: 足踝治疗指南的发布，为你提供了处理足踝问题患者的最新循证框架。这直接指导你的临床实践，让你能更有效地管理这类常见问题。
item.author: APTA

item.title: Therapeutic Management of Pediatric Hypermobility Spectrum Disorder: An Evidence-Based Care Guideline
item.description: 针对儿童高活动度谱系障碍的循证护理指南已发布。这意味着你在管理这类患者时，有了一套明确、科学的评估和干预框架，避免经验主义。
item.author: APTA

item.title: American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons: Management of Rotator Cuff Injuries Clinical Practice Guideline
item.description: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。作为物理治疗师，理解这份指南将帮助你更好地与骨科医生协作，优化肩袖损伤患者的综合管理。
item.author: APTA

item.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
item.description: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (N=54 analyzed) found 12 sessions of High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (Numeric Rating Scale: -6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001) and function (MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001) compared to sham in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP) patients at 12 weeks.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: What does best practice care for musculoskeletal pain look like ...
item.description: A systematic review identified eleven consistent recommendations from high-quality clinical practice guidelines for best practice care in musculoskeletal pain.
item.author: BJSM

item.title: 肩關節鏡術後復健怎麼做才對？旋轉肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩實證指南
item.description: A comprehensive Chinese evidence-based guideline details post-arthroscopy rehabilitation protocols for rotator cuff, Bankart, SLAP, and adhesive capsulitis, emphasizing activity timing based on tear size.
item.author: Doctorally

item.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
item.description: This systematic review and meta-analysis of 23 RCTs (n=1883) found that exercise interventions significantly reduced pain (SMD -0.66; 95% CI -0.83 to -0.49) and improved function (SMD -0.64; 95% CI -0.83 to -0.44) in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
item.description: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different physical therapy methods and techniques in improving symptoms triggered by endometriosis.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: "Comparison Between Robotic and Conventional Walking Recovery Training Methods in People With Spinal Cord Injury": Systematic Review with Pairwise and Network meta-analysis.
item.description: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of 16 studies compared Robotic Body Weight Supported Treadmill Training (RBWSTT), Overground Robotic Exoskeleton Training (ORET), and Conventional Physiotherapy (CP) on gait and cardiovascular outcomes in individuals with Spinal Cord Injury (SCI).
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Community-Based Exercise for Chronic Pain in People with Spinal Cord Injury: A Pragmatic Randomized Controlled Trial
item.description: A pragmatic randomized controlled trial tested the hypothesis that home/community-based exercise, prescribed according to the Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) Exercise Guidelines, reduces chronic pain.
item.author: Archives of PM&R

item.title: Using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible after stroke
item.description: A study on medRxiv suggests that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible for individuals after stroke.
item.author: medRxiv

item.title: Efficacy of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation combined with soft robotic glove training for slight-to-moderate post-stroke upper limb spasticity: a randomized controlled trial.
item.description: 一项随机对照试验（N=54）显示，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）联合软性机器人手套训练能改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: GIRFT launches best practice tool to support primary care colleagues to assess and manage patients with spinal pain - Spinal Surgery News
item.description: GIRFT (Getting It Right First Time) launched a best practice tool in the UK to assist primary care practitioners in assessing and managing patients with spinal pain.
item.author: Spinal Surgery News

item.title: Pelvic floor workout may Reduce Postpartum Stress Urinary Incontinence: JAMA
item.description: A report in JAMA suggests that pelvic floor workouts may significantly reduce postpartum stress urinary incontinence.
item.author: Medical Dialogues
